current_hypothesis: The AI content creation market in 2026 has a clear professional stack: LLM scripting → generative image/video models → voice synthesis → AI-assisted editing → automated distribution. Cloud SaaS tools dominate for beginners/SMBs; ComfyUI/n8n orchestration dominates for power users and agencies.
open_questions: How do entertainment studios (Netflix, streamers) actually use AI content creation internally?
What are the legal/IP risks of using AI-generated content commercially in 2026?
How does Tavus real-time avatar API compare for sales/personalization at scale?
What are actual engagement rate differences between AI-generated vs human-created content?
